title: Dirt Tools and Armour
description: Adds dirt equipment because why not
body:
Adds dirt tools to the game which are crafted like the vanilla tools and armour

You can use
- Dirt
- Coarse Dirt
- Rooted Dirt
- Grass Blocks
- Podzol
- Mycelium

Feel free to add this mod to your modrinth modpack

Dirt armour is weak but can get the job done for very basic starter armour with the whole set giving 5 armour points (helmet 1, chestplate 2, leggings 1, boots 1)
